memory: Planned out the implementation of Hard Memory using ChromaDB and semantic search.

Created hard_memory_plan.md — comprehensive plan for Hard Memory system with ChromaDB, covering architecture, 3-phase implementation roadmap, dual soft/hard memory design, and updated agent instructions.
Summarized the milestones reached so far (core system, hard memory plan) and identified the next steps for implementation.
Ready to begin Phase 1 of the Hard Memory project: Foundation, starting with the installation of ChromaDB.
Completed integration of hard memory system with auto-sync and semantic search support.
